title: Success, Careers, and Personal Growth Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A strong desire to achieve something important in life.
choices: ambition
dedication
achievement
rounds.answer: ambition
rounds.explanation: ambition: A strong desire to achieve something important in life.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A job that requires special training or education.
choices: ambition
dedication
profession
rounds.answer: profession
rounds.explanation: profession: A job that requires special training or education.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Being honest and having strong moral principles, even when no one is watching.
choices: dedication
integrity
ambition
rounds.answer: integrity
rounds.explanation: integrity: Being honest and having strong moral principles, even when no one is watching.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

An important event or stage in the development of something.
A job that requires special training or education.
A person learning a trade or skill from an experienced worker.

The opinion that people have about someone based on their behaviour and achievements.
A hope or dream of achieving something in the future.
The ability to see what needs to be done and do it without being told.
A firm decision to do something and not give up.
